{{Quote|It is said that the Empire has been conducting secretive experiments there with the help of the Geonosians. Possibly involving biological weapons. The laboratory can be found on Yavin IV.|[[Pashna Starkiller (Mon Calamari)|Pashna Starkiller]], to a Rebel spacer|<ref name="SWG:PS">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=other|Corellian Corvette Pre-Quest: "Pashna Starkiller"}}</ref>}}
The '''Geonosian Bio-Lab''', also known as the '''Geonosian biogenics research laboratory''', was a [[Laboratory/Legends|laboratory]] hidden on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] used by the [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosians]]. The lab was used to test experiments on many creatures, causing them to [[Mutant|mutate]] to hideous beasts, for use in the [[Petranaki arena|Geonosian Execution Arena]] on [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]].

==History==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Spy/Legends|spies]] intercepted transmissions from an [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]] named [[Harmon Vintollo]] on [[Kaadara]] and an undercover [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] operative named [[Teraeza Furloti]] in a [[Hotel/Legends|hotel]] in [[Tyrena/Legends|Tyrena]] on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. They both spoke of a hidden biogenics lab run by the [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosians]]. The information was later leaked to the [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]]. Information was also revealed when Geonosian named [[Ikvizi]] who was being held [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] gave the coordinates to get a domesticated [[bolotaur]] within the lab to a helpful traveler.<ref name="AED" />

Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], rumors began circulating around [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] about the hidden laboratory. Other, more sinister creations such as [[Mutant|mutated]] [[Kwi]]s and [[Kliknik]]s with [[Force power/Legends|Force powers]] were being developed for use.<ref name="AED" />

Seismic events compromised the base's integrity, disabling the [[Holoprojector/Legends|holo-generators]] that hid the entrance to the complex. The tremors also caused minor cave-ins, structural collapses and sporadic power losses, resulting in mass chaos throughout the complex.<ref name="AED" />

The base's security system soon malfunctioned. The [[Sentry droid/Legends|sentry droids]] guarding the complex were confused and proceeded to attack any unlucky adventurers who happened to stumble upon the exposed laboratory.<ref name="AED" />

It is not known what became of the lab after the Galactic Civil War. Rumors persist that some small groups of [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] journeyed bravely to the very bottom of the lab to kill the numerous [[Acklay/Legends|acklays]] that were lurking there, in order to loot valuable materials about the creature that could potentially be used in various weaponry.<ref name="AED" />

The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] suspected the Geonosians working there to be secretly backed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="SWG:PS" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> the Rebel agent [[Pashna Starkiller (Mon Calamari)|Pashna Starkiller]] dispatched a spacer to the caves in order to retrieve an Imperial dossier with information concerning a particularly ruthless Imperial commander.<ref name="SWG:PS" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Geonosian Bio-Lab was a "dungeon" in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online role-playing game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:GBLF" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> The Geonosian Bio-Lab was added to the game with an [[W:c:swg:Update Notes: 24 February 04|update]] released on [[February 24]], [[2004]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish 6: The Imperial Crackdown">{{SonyCite|url=recent_updates.jsp?o=60893|text=Publish 6: The Imperial Crackdown}}</ref>
